name: Would You Let Me Eat the Flame-Flame Fruit?

issues.description: GiveKeyword action missing target specification for Lucy Leader. Text specifies 'your [Lucy] Leader' — should have target with scope and name filter.
Duration is 'EndOfTurn' but text states 'during this turn' — should be 'DuringYourTurn' (effect active only during your turn, not persisting to end).
Missing PowerBoost action for '+3000 power'. Text requires both DoubleAttack keyword AND +3000 power boost.
Second trigger with type 'Trigger' and duplicate DrawCard is malformed. This card has no secondary trigger condition — this effect should be removed entirely.
